languages.text: {n}Диск планеты окутан полупрозрачной дымкой атмосферы. Ее льдистая поверхность сияет и переливается в лучах звезды словно огромный бриллиант с тысячами граней.{/n}
{n}The disk of the planet is shrouded in a translucent haze of atmosphere. Its icy surface gleams and sparkles in the starlight like a huge diamond with thousands of facets.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Диск планеты окутан полупрозрачной дымкой атмосферы. Ее льдистая поверхность сияет и переливается в лучах звезды словно огромный бриллиант с тысячами граней.{/n}

languages.text: {n}行星的盘面笼罩在朦胧的薄雾之中，冰封的表面在星光下熠熠生辉，犹如一颗拥有万千切面的巨大钻石。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The disk of the planet is shrouded in a translucent haze of atmosphere. Its icy surface gleams and sparkles in the starlight like a huge diamond with thousands of facets.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La atmósfera cubre el disco del planeta como si de una niebla translúcida se tratara. La superficie helada resplandece bajo las estrellas y brilla como el más preciado de los diamantes.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The disk of the planet is shrouded in a translucent haze of atmosphere. Its icy surface gleams and sparkles in the starlight like a huge diamond with thousands of facets.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le disque de la planète est ceint d'une atmosphère brumeuse translucide. Sa surface gelée brille et scintille sous les étoiles, comme un gigantesque diamant aux multiples facettes.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The disk of the planet is shrouded in a translucent haze of atmosphere. Its icy surface gleams and sparkles in the starlight like a huge diamond with thousands of facets.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le disque de la planète est ceint d'une atmosphère brumeuse translucide. Sa surface gelée brille et scintille sous les étoiles, comme un gigantesque diamant aux multiples facettes.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Gezegenin diski, yarı saydam bir atmosfer pusuyla örtülü. Buzlu yüzeyi, binlerce yüzeyi olan devasa bir elmas gibi yıldız ışığında parlayıp ışıldıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The disk of the planet is shrouded in a translucent haze of atmosphere. Its icy surface gleams and sparkles in the starlight like a huge diamond with thousands of facets.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Planetenscheibe ist in eine durchscheinende Atmosphäre gehüllt. Die vereiste Oberfläche schimmert und funkelt wie ein riesiger Diamant mit Tausenden von Facetten im Licht der Sterne.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The disk of the planet is shrouded in a translucent haze of atmosphere. Its icy surface gleams and sparkles in the starlight like a huge diamond with thousands of facets.{/n}

languages.text: {n}惑星の円盤は、半透明な大気によって覆われている。その氷の表面は、星光に輝き、まるで何千もの面を持つ巨大なダイヤモンドのように光る。{/n}
